items.name: Dance Potion
items.description: One sip gives you uncontrollable dance fever!

items.name: Staff of Sparks
items.description: This staff shoots mini ball-lightnings.

items.name: Sword of the Eternal Abyss
items.description: Click to slash and double click to lunge. Each hit will do 20-26 points of damage. Hit the 'Q' key to activate this item's special attack.

items.name: Heartbreaker
items.description: "You're a heart breaker / dream maker, love taker / Don't you mess around with me!"

items.name: Mythic Sword of the Tides
items.description: Time and tides wait for no man. Slash at your enemies, dealing 15 to 22 damage. Water splashes on the sword each time you swing. Double click to dash forward, dealing 25% more damage, increasing the maximum possible damage cap to 33. Hit the 'Q' key to activate its special, which creates 12 deadly waves around you in a circle, which rise from the ground.

items.name: Ninja Jump Potion
items.description: Do some sweet ninja jumping with this ninja potion!

items.name: Sorcus' Chair
items.description: This is how he rolls...and trolls....  Sorcus' Chair came out of the Surly Gift of Sorcus II on October 26th, 2012.

items.name: Forbidden Box
items.description: You know that box your gramps told you never to open?  Now you know why!  The Forbidden Box will summon several violent beasts, which will hunt down any player, friend or foe, who lays eyes on it or falls within its area of effect. You can spawn up to four monsters at a time, each of which is capable of dealing 10 points of damage per second.

items.name: Fang Of Anansi
items.description: "The surest poison is time"... but the second surest poison is contained in the spiders unleashed by this powerful sword. Slash and stab with the blade, or summon spiders to defeat your foe for you.

items.name: Ice Staff
items.description: Click on a location within 64 studs of your character to create a large wall of ice. The ice is slippery and nigh impossible to climb. Use it to block off corridors and routes of escape!

items.name: Shadow Sword
items.description: Equipping the Shadow Sword shrouds your character in darkness. You immediately transform into a warrior wearing a jet-black suit and begin emitting a cloud of dark fog. While your appearance unnerves and disorients your opponents, each sword strike does 35 points of damage and pressing space twice teleports you forward.

items.name: Moonwalk Dance Potion
items.description: We are here to change the world!

items.name: Spec Omega Biograft Energy Sword
items.description: Black energy is the heaviest kind of energy.  The sword does some serious damage.

items.name: Midnight Sword
items.description: Slash at your foes to do 10 damage. Charge the sword by holding down the left mouse button to change day to night, increase your walk speed, and increase the damage your sword does.

items.name: Gork, Your Caveman Shoulder Friend
items.description: He would be a better conversationalist if his vocabulary were bigger than 12 words.

items.name: Ninja Blink Potion
items.description: You blink - you're in a new location.  Yeah - Ninjas are fast!

items.name: Frostbrand
items.description: A weapon bestowed upon Azurewrath's elite personal bodyguards upon the attainment of rank.

items.name: Foam Finger
items.description: GOoooooooooo ROBLOX!

items.name: Dual Venomshanks
items.description: Great for lunging and slashing, but its real damage comes with its special ability.  Hit 'E', 'Q', 'Z', or 'X' to create acid rain that will fall on anyone in a 50 stud radius.

items.name: Staff of Neverending Frost
items.description: Freeze your enemies solid!

items.name: Omega Rainbow Sword
items.description: The power of all future rainbows is at your finger tips. Click to slash, dealing 18 to 22 damage per hit. Double click to dash forward with the speed of a magical rainbow!

items.name: Leland the Lolturtle
items.description: Leland does it for the lulz.

items.name: Dragon Slayers Sword and Shield
items.description: Protecting the people from dragons is its primary goal.  Whatever else you do with it is your own business.

items.name: Overseer Warlord's Sword
items.description: The mighty can take what they want. This mythical blade flames green and does 17 damage per slash.  Double click to dash attack. The mighty magic of this blade protects you from your foes and reduces damage by 20%.

items.name: Ghostfire Sword
items.description: This super fast sword will put you miles ahead of your opponents. Combine its speed with the damaging Ghostfire, and you're unstoppable!

items.name: Chiefjustus Gavel
items.description: Dispense justice for all with this oversized justice gavel.  Dispense justice even faster with its secret moves!  Not unlike a ban hammer if I do say so myself...

items.name: RoVacuum 2012
items.description: Cleaning up ROBLOXia, parts and noobs alike.

items.name: Sword of Ancalagon
items.description: More than a mere sword, this amazing tool shoots Ancalagon's own Dragon Fire at anyone in the area.

items.name: Staff of the Winds
items.description: Try it for free in the ROBLOX Thanksgiving Turkey Hunt! Hold down the left mouse button to unleash a huge gust of wind that will blow away enemies and loose parts alike!

items.name: Sword of Starlight
items.description: You have the power of stars!
